title: External Dependency State
description: Schema for the External Dependency State manifest: declared external services the cell depends on, including certificate expiry tracking. External dependencies are services outside the cell boundary (e.g. DNS providers, SMTP relays, certificate authorities).

cell_id.description: Stable unique identity of the Infrastructure Cell this external dependency state belongs to

declared_at.description: Timestamp when this external dependency state was last updated

collection_errors.description: Errors encountered during external dependency state collection

dependencies.description: Declared external dependencies — services outside the cell boundary

id.description: Stable unique identifier for this dependency, e.g. cloudflare-dns, smtp-relay-sendgrid

endpoint.description: Primary endpoint for this dependency (URL, hostname, or host:port)

description.description: Human-readable description of what this dependency provides

required_by.description: Names of services or VMs in this cell that depend on this external service

status.description: Observed reachability status at last check

last_checked_at.description: Timestamp when reachability and certificate state were last verified

certificate.description: TLS certificate state for HTTPS endpoints. Null for non-TLS dependencies.

health_check_url.description: URL to probe for health checks, if different from endpoint

failover.description: Failover endpoint or fallback strategy if this dependency becomes unreachable

sans.description: Subject Alternative Names covered by this certificate

last_checked_at.description: Timestamp when this certificate state was last collected

auto_renew.description: Whether this certificate is managed by an auto-renewal agent (e.g. cert-manager, certbot)
